zh.Alvanley, Cheshire, England, United King: 英國英格蘭爾阿爾萬利
zh.Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England: 英國爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Venables於1299年1月8日出生在英國爾阿爾萬利時，她的父親Hugh de Venables43歲，母親Agatha de Vernon19歲。她於1313年與Stephen Stanbrook在英國英格蘭爾阿爾萬利結婚。她去世於1328年在英國爾阿爾德福德享年29歲，埋葬在英國爾阿爾德福德。

zh-hans.Alvanley, Cheshire, England, United King: 英国英格兰爾阿爾萬利
zh-hans.Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England: 英国爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Venables于1299年1月8日出生在英国爾阿爾萬利时，她的父亲Hugh de Venables43岁，母亲Agatha de Vernon19岁。她于1313年与Stephen Stanbrook在英国英格兰爾阿爾萬利结婚。她去世于1328年在英国爾阿爾德福德享年29岁，埋葬在英国爾阿爾德福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Venables was born on 8 January 1299, in Alvanley, Cheshire, England, her father, Hugh de Venables, was 43 and her mother, Agatha de Vernon, was 19. She married Stephen Stanbrook in 1313, in Alvanley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. She died in 1328, in Aldford, Cheshire, England, at the age of 29, and was buried in Aldford, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Venables est née le 8 janvier 1299, à Alvanley, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Venables, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Agatha de Vernon, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Stephen Stanbrook en 1313, à Alvanley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée en 1328, à Aldford, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterrée à Aldford, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Venables am 8. Januar 1299 in Alvanley, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Venables 43 und ihre Mutter Agatha de Vernon 19. Sie hat 1313 in Alvanley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Stephen Stanbrook geheiratet. Sie starb 1328 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Aldford, Cheshire, England und wurde in Aldford, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Venables è nata il il 8 gennaio 1299 nel Alvanley, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Hugh de Venables, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Agatha de Vernon, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Stephen Stanbrook nel 1313, nel Alvanley, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1328, nel Aldford, Cheshire, England, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolta a Aldford, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Venablesが1299年1月8日にイギリスチェシュアイアアルヴァンリーで生まれた時，父Hugh de Venablesは43歳，母Agatha de Vernonは19歳であった。1313年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアルヴァンリーでStephen Stanbrookと結婚した。彼女は1328年にイギリスチェシュアイアアルドフォードで29歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアアルドフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Venables(이)가 1299년 1월 8일 영국 체실르 앨반리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Venables(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agatha de Vernon(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1313년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 앨반리에서 Stephen Stanbrook(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1328년 영국 체실르 알드퍼드에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 알드퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Venables nasceu em 8 de janeiro de 1299, em Alvanley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Venables, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Agatha de Vernon, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Stephen Stanbrook em 1313, em Alvanley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em 1328, em Aldford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 29 anos, e foi sepultada em Aldford, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Venables родилась 8 января 1299 г. в местности алванли, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh de Venables было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Agatha de Vernon, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Stephen Stanbrook в 1313 г. в местности алванли, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла в 1328 г. в местности алдфорд, чешир, Англия в возрасте 29 лет и была похоронена в местности алдфорд, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Venables nació el 8 de enero de 1299, en Alvanley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Venables, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Agatha de Vernon, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Stephen Stanbrook en 1313, en Alvanley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en 1328, en Aldford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultada en Aldford, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
